function:
def modify_features(df_input) -> pd.DataFrame:
    """
    Thought 1: The absolute difference between Left-Weight and Right-Weight can capture the imbalance in weight distribution.
    New Feature 1: weight_difference | weight_difference = abs(Left-Weight - Right-Weight)
    """
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    """
    The goal of the new features in this version is to capture the imbalance between Left-Weight, Left-Distance, Right-Weight, and Right-Distance.
    New Feature 1: weight_difference | weight_difference = abs(Left-Weight - Right-Weight)
    New Feature 2: distance_difference | distance_difference = abs(Left-Distance - Right-Distance)
    New Feature 3: weight_ratio | weight_ratio = Square Root of ((Left-Weight / Right-Weight) + 1)
    New Feature 4: distance_ratio | distance_ratio = Square Root of ((Left-Distance / Right-Distance) + 1)
    New Feature 5: is_right_heavier | is_right_heavier = (Left-Weight - Right-Weight > 0).astype(int)
    New Feature 6: is_left_heavier | is_left_heavier = ((Left-Weight - Right-Weight) < 0).astype(int)
    New Feature 7: is_distance_close | is_distance_close = (abs(Left-Distance - Right-Distance) < 3).astype(int)
    """
    df_output = df_input.copy()
    
    # Calculate absolute difference between Left-Weight and Right-Weight
    df_output['weight_difference'] = abs(df_output['Left-Weight'] - df_output['Right-Weight'])
    
    # Calculate absolute difference between Left-Distance and Right-Distance
    df_output['distance_difference'] = abs(df_output['Left-Distance'] - df_output['Right-Distance'])
    
    # Calculate the square root of the ratio of Left-Weight and Right-Weight
    df_output['weight_ratio'] = (df_output['Left-Weight'] / df_output['Right-Weight'] + 1).apply(lambda x: np.sqrt(x))
    
    # Calculate the square root of the ratio of Left-Distance and Right-Distance
    df_output['distance_ratio'] = (df_output['Left-Distance'] / df_output['Right-Distance'] + 1).apply(lambda x: np.sqrt(x))
    
    # Create a binary feature indicating if Right-Weight is heavier than Left-Weight
    df_output['is_right_heavier'] = (df_output['Left-Weight'] - df_output['Right-Weight'] > 0).astype(int)
